name: Detroit Land Bank Authority
description_short: Detroit Land Bank Authority is a credit repair provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 2.6/5 with 159 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Detroit Land Bank Authority is a credit repair provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. With 159 Google reviews and a 2.6/5.0 rating, Detroit Land Bank Authority has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Detroit Land Bank Authority specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Detroit, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Detroit Land Bank Authority operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering Detroit Land Bank Authority should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
